serverInfo.name: readgzh
serverInfo.displayName: ReadGZH — WeChat Article Reader for AI
serverInfo.title: ReadGZH
serverInfo.description: Let AI read full-text WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) articles. Cloud-based, zero-install. Returns title, author, publish time, and clean Markdown content. Supports standard articles and image-post (图文) formats. Includes search, list, and AI summary tools.

authentication.description: API Key required for reliable access. Without a key, requests are subject to a strict 10/day per-IP anonymous limit and may return 429 errors. Get a free key at https://readgzh.site/dashboard — 30 credits/day free, with paid tiers for higher quotas.

credentials.getKey: Sign up free at readgzh.site, then go to Dashboard → API Keys → Create. Free tier gives 30 credits/day; copy the key starting with sk_live_.

tools.name: readgzh.read
tools.description: Read and extract the full text of a WeChat article from its mp.weixin.qq.com URL. Returns title, author, publish time, and clean Markdown content. Article is automatically cached for subsequent reads (0 credits for everyone).

tools.name: readgzh.search
tools.description: Search cached WeChat articles by keyword in titles and content. Returns matching slugs and snippets.

tools.name: readgzh.list
tools.description: List recently cached WeChat articles. Useful for discovery and browsing.

tools.name: readgzh.get
tools.description: Get a previously cached WeChat article by its slug or article ID. Supports paginated reading of long articles via the part parameter.

part.description: Part number for paginated reading of long articles (1-indexed)

mode.description: 'summary' returns an AI-generated structured summary (Pro tier only)

prompts.name: summarize_wechat_article
prompts.description: Read a WeChat article and return a structured summary (Pro tier).

pricing.free_tier: 30 credits/day for registered users, 10 reads/day for anonymous IP

highlights: Cloud-based — no local WeChat desktop installation required
Shared cache — previously read articles cost 0 credits for everyone
CDN image proxy — permanent image access, no expiry
AI structured summaries via mode=summary (Pro tier)

examples.title: Search Chinese AI articles
examples.prompt: Find recent WeChat articles about DeepSeek
